name: Fate Core
license: Original mechanics references; ladder labels and Fate dice notation are common to Fate-family games. No verbatim Evil Hat text reproduced. Compatible with the Fate Core SRD (CC-BY 3.0).
summary: Narrative-first rules-light system. Resolve actions with 4 Fate dice (4dF, each -1/0/+1) plus a skill rating, compared to a target on the Fate ladder. Fate Points fuel aspect invocations for re-rolls and bonuses; stress and consequences absorb damage at narrative cost.

Trivial.description: Mediocre — no roll required unless interesting.

Average.description: Average — anyone with a related skill should succeed.

Fair.description: Fair — competent practitioner with some effort.

Good.description: Good — skilled work; failure here is a real possibility.

Superb.description: Superb — only the best succeed without aspect support.

Fantastic.description: Fantastic — heroic feat; expect aspect invocations.

attributes.name: Refresh
attributes.description: Maximum Fate Points the character starts each session with. Each Stunt taken at character creation reduces this by 1; minimum of 1.

skills.name: Athletics
skills.description: Running, jumping, climbing, dodging, athletic feats.

skills.name: Burglary
skills.description: Picking locks, disabling security, casing locations.

skills.name: Contacts
skills.description: Knowing the right person, social network reach.

skills.name: Crafts
skills.description: Building, repairing, working with tools and materials.

skills.name: Drive
skills.description: Operating vehicles, chases, stunts behind the wheel.

skills.name: Empathy
skills.description: Reading people, sensing motives and lies, recovering Mental stress.

skills.name: Investigate
skills.description: Active research and deliberate examination of evidence.

skills.name: Lore
skills.description: Knowledge — academic, occult, technical depending on character concept.

skills.name: Notice
skills.description: Passive perception, situational awareness, initiative in conflicts.

skills.name: Physique
skills.description: Raw strength and stamina; expands Physical stress track.

skills.name: Provoke
skills.description: Goading, intimidating, creating emotional disadvantage on a target.

skills.name: Rapport
skills.description: Building friendly connection, persuading honestly, recovering social standing.

skills.name: Resources
skills.description: Wealth and material resources; can substitute for time and gear.

skills.name: Shoot
skills.description: Ranged attacks — bows, firearms, thrown weapons.

skills.name: Will
skills.description: Mental toughness and discipline; expands Mental stress track.

derivedStats.name: Fate Points
derivedStats.formula: Refresh at session start; spent and earned during play.

derivedStats.name: Physical Stress
derivedStats.formula: 3 boxes baseline; Physique 1-2 grants box 3 already; Physique 3+ adds a 4th box; Physique 5+ adds a 5th.

derivedStats.name: Mental Stress
derivedStats.formula: 3 boxes baseline; Will 1-2 grants box 3 already; Will 3+ adds a 4th box; Will 5+ adds a 5th.

derivedStats.name: Mild Consequence
derivedStats.formula: Absorbs 2 shifts of stress at the cost of taking on a Mild aspect.

derivedStats.name: Moderate Consequence
derivedStats.formula: Absorbs 4 shifts of stress at the cost of taking on a Moderate aspect.

derivedStats.name: Severe Consequence
derivedStats.formula: Absorbs 6 shifts of stress at the cost of taking on a Severe aspect.

values.label: +2 Bonus
values.description: Spent 1 Fate Point to add +2 to a roll.

values.label: Reroll
values.description: Spent 1 Fate Point to reroll the four Fate dice.

values.label: Story Declaration
values.description: Spent 1 Fate Point to declare a fact about the scene that fits an aspect.
